metric_results.label: Core metric coverage
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect source provenance, period coverage, OCR promotion, and canonical fact deduplication.

threshold_policy.rationale: MVP requires broad core-metric coverage before valuation.

metric_results.label: Statement completeness
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect source provenance, period coverage, OCR promotion, and canonical fact deduplication.

threshold_policy.rationale: Every required statement for the evaluated scope must be present.

metric_results.label: Source provenance coverage
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect source provenance, period coverage, OCR promotion, and canonical fact deduplication.

threshold_policy.rationale: Every evaluated fact must be traceable to a concrete source.

metric_results.label: Accepted official reconciliation
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect source provenance, period coverage, OCR promotion, and canonical fact deduplication.

threshold_policy.rationale: Material facts need strong official-source reconciliation.

metric_results.label: Material OCR error count
metric_results.remediation_hint: Resolve OCR errors that affect material numbers used in the report.

threshold_policy.rationale: OCR errors affecting material report numbers cannot enter final artifacts.

metric_results.label: OCR unresolved rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Reduce unresolved OCR corpus errors and keep material OCR errors out of final artifacts.

threshold_policy.rationale: Corpus-level OCR unresolved rate is an operational warning threshold, not a hard zero release gate.

metric_results.label: Duplicate canonical fact count
metric_results.remediation_hint: Deduplicate canonical facts by ticker, period, line item, and source priority.

threshold_policy.rationale: Canonical facts must have one governed winner per ticker-period-line-item-source-priority key.

metric_results.label: Valuation method data readiness
metric_results.remediation_hint: Block headline target price and recommendation until valuation methods are publishable from high-confidence inputs.

threshold_policy.rationale: A numeric valuation output is insufficient; low-confidence FCFF, blocked FCFE, or draft-only blend must block headline target price and recommendation.

metric_results.label: Pandera DataFrame schema validity
metric_results.remediation_hint: Repair the connector DataFrame rows reported by Pandera before normalization.

threshold_policy.rationale: Connector and golden fact rows must satisfy the governed DataFrame contract.

source_documents_used: DHG Annual Report 2021 — Báo cáo thường niên
DHG Audited Financial Statements 2021 — BCTC kiểm toán năm 2021
golden_provenance.notes: Key financial figures for 2021FY extracted from DHG Annual Report 2021 and cross-checked against audited financial statements. Values in VND billion unless stated. EPS in VND per share. Revenue, gross profit, net income, total assets, equity, OCF, capex verified against BCTC kiểm toán page references.
